allow: Bash(sudo -S strace -f -e trace=mount,chroot,clone,fork,execve,write -o /tmp/rustbox_strace.log timeout 10 target/debug/judge execute-code --strict --box-id 1 --language python --code 'print\(""hello""\)')

Bash(sudo -S bash -c 'strace -f -e trace=mount,chroot,clone,clone3,fork,execve,unshare,pivot_root -o /tmp/rustbox_strace2.log target/debug/judge execute-code --strict --box-id 1 --language python --code ""print\(\\""hello\\""\)"" &
BGPID=$!
sleep 12
kill -9 $BGPID 2>/dev/null
wait $BGPID 2>/dev/null
echo ""=== STRACE DONE ===""')

Bash(sudo -S bash -c 'strace -ff -o /tmp/rustbox_trace target/debug/judge execute-code --strict --box-id 1 --language python --code ""print\(\\""hello\\""\)"" &
BGPID=$!
sleep 12
kill -9 $BGPID 2>/dev/null
wait $BGPID 2>/dev/null
echo ""=== DONE ===""
ls -la /tmp/rustbox_trace*')
Bash(echo "toor" | sudo -S cargo test --test integration_execution -- --include-ignored 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S cargo test --test integration_execution -- --include-ignored 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S cargo test --test integration_execution cpp_nonzero_exit_is_runtime_error_permissive -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -30)
Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S cargo test --test integration_execution java_hello_world_permissive -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -20)
Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S bash -c 'RUST_LOG=debug cargo test --test integration_execution java_hello_world_permissive -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -40')

Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S bash -c 'mkdir -p /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_instance && echo 536870912 > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_instance/memory.limit_in_bytes && cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_instance/memory.limit_in_bytes && rmdir /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_instance')

Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S bash -c 'mkdir -p /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_javac && echo 536870912 > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_javac/memory.limit_in_bytes && echo $$ > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_javac/tasks && /usr/bin/javac --version 2>&1; rmdir /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_javac')

Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S bash -c 'mkdir -p /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_jvm2 && echo 67108864 > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_jvm2/memory.limit_in_bytes && echo $$ > /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_jvm2/tasks && java -version 2>&1 && rmdir /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/test_jvm2')
Bash(ulimit -v && ulimit -m && echo "stack size limit:" && ulimit -s)

Bash(echo "root" | sudo -S bash -c '
# Monitor cgroup in background
while true; do
  if [ -f /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/rustbox_300/memory.limit_in_bytes ]; then
    echo "FOUND: $\(cat /sys/fs/cgroup/memory/rustbox/rustbox_300/memory.limit_in_bytes\)"
    break
  fi
  sleep 0.01
done &
MONITOR_PID=$!

# Run the test \(build already done\)
cargo test --test integration_execution java_hello_world_permissive -- --nocapture 2>&1 | tail -5

kill $MONITOR_PID 2>/dev/null
wait $MONITOR_PID 2>/dev/null
' 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" | head -20)
